newsSince: No new company-specific news since June 9. The material event - FQ2 2026 (rev $1.57B +40% YoY, EPS $1.64 vs $1.40 est, backlog +$600M seq to $7.7B, FY26 guide raised to $6.3B, first hyperscaler multi-rail/Hyper-Rail award) - was reported June 3 and is already captured in the June 9 prior cases. The +3.6% move since June 9 is flow/recovery from the post-print flush.

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha vs passives: the asymmetry-restoring flush and improved fundamentals (record $7.7B backlog, raised FY guide) were already actioned in the June 9 'up' move. Nothing new since; the recovery bounce partly closes that gap. Ciena stays peripheral to the passive/power stack. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Record backlog, raised FY26 to $6.3B, first hyperscaler multi-rail award; supply lagging demand.
verdicts.neutral: Strong AI-optical backbone story but peripheral to the passives/power bottleneck this page rewards.
verdicts.bear: Now full consensus AI-optical; +85% YTD, crowding-sensitive page penalizes the re-rating.

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent lens: FQ2 made Ciena maximally non-latent (cloud ~46% of rev, full-consensus AI-optical story). No new info since June 9; the bounce does not re-hide the node. Small positive drift already reflected. Hold near list bottom.
verdicts.bull: AI-era optical transport is core; backlog and guide raise validate demand durability.
verdicts.neutral: Obvious optical thesis - no longer a hidden node, but fundamentally healthy.
verdicts.bear: Fully discovered; cloud concentration and rerating remove the latency this page seeks.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Thesis fully consensus; no latent edge left

verdicts.rankRationale: Under-owned-bottleneck master list: bottleneck evidence (record backlog, supply lagging demand, $6.3B guide, first hyperscaler multi-rail) was strong and already drove the June 9 'up' call. No new fundamentals since; recovery bounce partly executes the prior thesis. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Scale-out bandwidth/optics leader; record backlog and multi-rail award extend visibility into 2027.
verdicts.neutral: Genuine bandwidth bottleneck exposure but already a well-followed name.
verdicts.bear: +85% YTD rerating; networking pricing/execution and concentration risk.
